{"society_power": 7.1, "state_power": 7.7, "society_change": 0.1, "state_change": -0.2, "key_event": "Emergency then 1977 electoral ouster; Punjab insurgency", "reasoning": "Society dipped hard during the 1975-77 Emergency but rebounded decisively by ousting Gandhi in 1977 and reasserting press/judicial independence and rising caste/regional mobilization, netting a slight gain. State capacity was contradictory: centralization under a personalized executive coexisted with hollowed intermediary institutions and open challenges to authority (Khalistan, Blue Star, 1984 pogroms), yielding a modest net decline."}
